author: mseidel42
body:
- Update Rivet and Yoda versions
- Re-enable the ONNX interface as needed by https://gitlab.cern.ch/cms-gen/Rivet/-/merge_requests/274, disabled download of onnx files (see https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/48077)
- Add generic postrelease patch file to be reused for any temporary patches
title: Rivet 4.1.2. and Yoda 2.1.2
